{"query": "SELECT
  fp.year,
  fp.semester_id,
  ds_sem.semester_name,
  COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN fp.status = 'Completed' THEN fp.amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS total_paid,
  COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN fp.status = 'Pending'   THEN fp.amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS total_pending
FROM fact_payment fp
JOIN dim_student ds   ON fp.student_id = ds.student_id
LEFT JOIN dim_semester ds_sem ON fp.semester_id = ds_sem.semester_id
WHERE ds.access_number = 'A26143'
GROUP BY fp.year, fp.semester_id, ds_sem.semester_name
ORDER BY fp.year, fp.semester_id;", "history": ["SELECT

  COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN fp.status = 'Completed' THEN fp.amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS total_paid,
  COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN fp.status = 'Pending'   THEN fp.amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS total_pending
FROM fact_payment fp

LEFT JOIN dim_semester ds_sem ON fp.semester_id = ds_sem.semester_id
WHERE ds.access_number = 'A69255'
GROUP BY fp.year, fp.semester_id, ds_sem.semester_name
ORDER BY fp.year, fp.semester_id;", "SELECT
  CONCAT('Q', dt.quarter, ' ', dt.year) AS period,
  AVG(fa.total_hours)                   AS avg_attendance
FROM fact_attendance fa
JOIN dim_student ds ON fa.student_id = ds.student_id
JOIN dim_time dt    ON fa.date_key   = dt.date_key
WHERE ds.access_number = 'A69255'
GROUP BY dt.year, dt.quarter
ORDER BY dt.year, dt.quarter;", "SELECT
    ds.student_id,
    ds.access_number,
    ds.reg_no,
    CONCAT(ds.first_name, ' ', ds.last_name) AS full_name,
    -- Enrollment
    COUNT(DISTINCT fe.enrollment_id)                           AS enrollments_count,
    -- Grades
    COUNT(DISTINCT fg.grade_id)                                AS grades_count,
    ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN fg.exam_status = 'Completed' THEN fg.grade ELSE NULL END), 2) AS avg_grade,
    -- Attendance
    COUNT(DISTINCT fa.attendance_id)                           AS attendance_records,
    SUM(fa.days_present)                                       AS total_days_present,
    SUM(fa.total_hours)                                        AS total_attendance_hours,
    -- Payments
    COUNT(DISTINCT fp.payment_id)                              AS payments_count,
    COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN fp.status = 'Completed' THEN fp.amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS total_paid,
    COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN fp.status = 'Pending'   THEN fp.amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS total_pending
FROM dim_student ds
LEFT JOIN fact_enrollment fe ON fe.student_id = ds.student_id
LEFT JOIN fact_grade      fg ON fg.student_id = ds.student_id
LEFT JOIN fact_attendance fa ON fa.student_id = ds.student_id
LEFT JOIN fact_payment    fp ON fp.student_id = ds.student_id
WHERE ds.access_number = 'A69255'
GROUP BY ds.student_id, ds.access_number, ds.reg_no, ds.first_name, ds.last_name;", "SELECT
  CONCAT(dt.month_name, ' ', dt.year) AS period,
  AVG(CASE WHEN fg.exam_status = 'Completed' THEN fg.grade ELSE NULL END) AS avg_grade
FROM fact_grade fg
JOIN dim_student ds ON fg.student_id = ds.student_id
JOIN dim_time dt    ON fg.date_key   = dt.date_key
WHERE ds.access_number = 'A69255'
GROUP BY dt.year, dt.month, dt.month_name
ORDER BY dt.year, dt.month;", "SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dim_student)      AS dim_student_count,

SELECT

    -- Enrollments
    COUNT(DISTINCT fe.enrollment_id)                     AS enrollments_count,

    SUM(fa.days_present)                                 AS total_days_present,
